data.body: AC amendment: md5sum output format is '<hash>  -' (two spaces + dash). Use printf '%s' "$tracker_dir" | md5sum | awk '{print $1}' | cut -c1-12 (not just cut -c1-12 directly). On macOS use md5 -q (quiet mode outputs hash only). Verify: printf '%s' '/some/path' | md5sum | awk '{print $1}' | cut -c1-12 | wc -c returns 13 (12 chars + newline)
